title: Luca Metehau
text: Home * People * Luca Metehau Luca Metehau [1] Luca-Mihnea Metehau , (Luca Metehău) a Romanian youth chess player, 10th grade student at the Tudor Vianu National College of Computer Science , participant of national and international Junior Olympiads in Informatics , and bronze medal winner of the Junior Balkan Olympiad in Informatics in 2019 [2] . Combining his both passions, Luca Metehau is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Clover , first released in April 2021 [3] .
